name: PRESSURE RPG
description:
19/04/26 update: wdym it was a set up

YOU make the scenario!

This bot is LARGE. Really, REALLY large. UNWIELDY, if you're so inclined, so I would highly recomend using a different AI model for this bot for it best to work. Janitor isn't known to be the best for bots THIS big.

This bot is big because it has EVERYTHING in it up to the Worth The Wait update. I don't plan on updating much further than that, because this bot is already unwieldy and way too big. If it talks for you, I can't really fix that. I take all info from the official Pressure Wiki.

Quick little update: If the characters start acting weird or out of character, I have no idea how to fix that. I took all of the information from the wiki. Just rate it one star and regenerate until you get the desired message, sorry yall :(

30.03.26 update: Holy hell this is my most favorited bot-
creator: VIOLENTTRIP
